judge_scores.reasoning: The response clearly states that the STF did not declare Lula innocent and annulled the convictions on procedural grounds.
The response clearly states the STF did not declare Lula innocent, explaining the annulment was due to procedural grounds.

The response clearly and accurately states that the STF did not declare Lula innocent but rather annulled convictions on procedural grounds (incompetência de foro/jurisdictional incompetence) and later recognized prescription, explicitly distinguishing these procedural outcomes from a merit-based declaration of innocence.
